name: Invesco CurrencyShares Euro Trust
business: Invesco CurrencyShares Euro Trust (FXE) issues shares that reflect the price in USD of the euro plus accrued interest, less expenses. It provides institutional and retail investors with a means to gain investment benefits similar to holding euro.
namedSuppliers: JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., London Branch

exposures.sentence: The investment objective of the Trust is for the Shares to reflect the price in USD of the euro plus accrued interest, if any, less the expenses of the Trust s operations.
